name: BBO and Deep Book Consensus (Tightened)
hypothesis: A strong directional signal occurs when both the best-bid-offer (BBO) imbalance (obi_1) and the deeper book imbalance (obi_ex_bbo) align. Tightening both thresholds isolates higher-conviction consensus, which should maintain or improve the already high win rate.
mutation_note: Based on feedback to 'tighten_threshold'. Increased thresholds for both obi_1 (0.5->0.7) and obi_ex_bbo (0.2->0.3) to test for robustness in a higher-conviction subset.
